meta.sourcePolicy: Official HPA/JPA sources only. This file records 2018 event-level source candidates and must not auto-promote athlete histories into data/database.json.
notes: Temporary 2018 official-source candidate addendum for HPA Event Watch.
Keep separate from athlete master data, confirmed athlete histories, event entries, and research candidates.
The linked annual HPA result PDF is an event-level source locator; individual athlete rows require separate identity and row verification before promotion.

Source summary flags are aligned with newer event-index candidate files: 2018 currently has only annual official result PDF and venue/date evidence confirmed in this file; outline, entry roster, schedule, program,速報, and YouTube live sources remain unconfirmed.

events.name: 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第4回北海道代表選考会
includedChampionships: 福井しあわせ元気国体・北海道代表選考会
高校男子・北海道学生区分を含む2018年5月13日開催結果

sources.title: 2018年北海道協会大会結果PDF
sources.evidenceLines: HPA official year result PDF pages for 国民体育大会パワーリフティング公開競技 第4回北海道代表選考会 state 2018年5月13日 and 会場 江別市民体育館. The header also references 福井しあわせ元気国体・北海道代表.

promotionGuardrails: Use this entry only as an official event source locator.
Do not create athlete histories from this file without row-level verification.
National-sport selection labels and ordinary Hokkaido championship labels must remain distinct in future importers.
Do not infer athlete progression comments from this addendum alone.

Bench-only results are not interchangeable with three-lift histories unless the consuming feature explicitly handles event type.

Do not infer three-lift progress from bench-only rows.
